message:
test(proptest): add 17 property tests for NTM importer types and behavioral invariants

Covers serde roundtrips for NtmSession/NtmWorkflow/NtmConfig/ImportFinding/
TranslatedWorkflow, plus behavioral properties: profile count >= 1 per session,
layout count matches window count, step count preserved, timeout conversion,
safety settings preserved, report count consistency, imported tags present,
min_panes accuracy, role translation safety, unsupported mode detection, and
full bundle serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
